seoTitle: Chigwell vs Chudleigh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chigwell and Chudleigh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chigwell and Chudleigh.
heading: Chigwell vs Chudleigh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chigwell, Tasmania and Chudleigh, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chigwell has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Chudleigh (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chigwell or Chudleigh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chigwell has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Chudleigh scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chigwell scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Chudleigh scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chigwell or Chudleigh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chigwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
